creator: zgabor@code.hu
text:
From the sh(1) manual, missing:
	1) the correct description of command-line editing (eg, nothing
	about the EMACS-MODE, so most of the people don't know, that
	we can ``set -o emacs'', and after it, can use the cursor keys)
	2) the arithmetic expression format is missing
	3) missing the ``let'' command's description (see 2.)

	There are some comments: unimplemented in 4.4alpha, but we
	don't know, is it means, unimplemented in FBSD, or not?
